accurate.why: Project descriptions and highlighted dollar amounts match the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; selectively highlights three projects and summarizes others without error.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the act authorizes 11 VA major medical facility projects for FY2024 with a cost ceiling for each.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The act provides new project-specific authorization rather than amending existing law; correctly notes this.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes per-project cost ceilings and the flexible appropriation timing provision.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2024 authorization and November 25, 2024, enactment date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all 11 project locations by name, describes scope, and notes the total appropriation authorization.

coherent.why: Well-organized; highlights key projects while summarizing others.

concise.why: More concise than other candidates; highlights major projects and summarizes the rest efficiently.

correct_entities.why: Department of Veterans Affairs and all project locations correctly named.

correct_figures.why: Highlighted dollar amounts ($759.2M, $613M, $370.37M) and total ~$3.35B match the bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
